qa_pair.question: List the top 5 most recently updated records in Contact with fields _id, name.full, and _updatedAt.
Find all opportunities created in the last 30 days grouped by status and return counts.
Show one record by id from Activity and include detail fields for lookup expansions.
Return the first 20 records from Product sorted by descending _updatedAt.
Build a cross-module SQL query that joins Contact and Opportunity and returns contact name plus opportunity status.
Generate a pivot for Opportunity with rows=status and values=count.
Generate a bar chart graph for Activity grouped by type with count aggregation.
List accessible modules and identify which ones contain at least one lookup field.
Build file download URL for a known file in document Contact and return final URL only.
Read Contact module fields and return only picklist field names.
